diagrams.title: Green IT Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchy of green IT strategies from infrastructure to measurement
diagrams.purpose: Understanding progression from basic hardware efficiency to comprehensive sustainability measurement

diagrams.title: PUE Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how energy flows in a data center and PUE calculation
elements: Total Facility Energy = IT Equipment + Cooling + Lighting + Other
IT Equipment Energy is productive energy
PUE = Total / IT Energy - Lower is better
diagrams.purpose: Visualize data center energy distribution and understand PUE metric

diagrams.title: Virtualization Concept
diagrams.description: Multiple virtual machines running on a single physical server
elements: Shared Resources: CPU, RAM, Storage, Network
diagrams.purpose: Understand how virtualization maximizes hardware utilization

diagrams.title: Traditional vs Virtualized Infrastructure
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing resource efficiency gains
elements: Traditional: 10 physical servers each at 10% utilization = 100% hardware, high energy
Virtualized: 2 physical servers at 50% utilization each running same workloads = 20% hardware, lower energy
Space savings, cooling reduction, and cost savings shown visually
diagrams.purpose: Compare resource efficiency between traditional and virtualized approaches
